title: Every Level of Hermes Agent Explained
summary: A tutorial series explaining seven levels of Hermes agent complexity, from basic prompting to fully autonomous systems that orchestrate multiple LLMs and execute scheduled tasks. Covers integration with Claude, ChatGPT, DeepSeek, and Grok through a unified framework.
writeup: The video walks through seven levels of Hermes agent complexity, starting with basic prompting and progressing to fully autonomous systems that orchestrate multiple LLMs and run scheduled tasks. It frames agent design as a graded progression rather than a single pattern, covering model routing, task decomposition, and subagents along the way. A central point is the unified framework that integrates Claude, ChatGPT, DeepSeek, and Grok, so different models can be combined under one orchestration layer.
